description: You are a legged robotics control engineer importing a quadruped robot into Webots. To stabilize the simulation physics, set the WorldInfo basicTimeStep to 8. For the CUSTOM_QUADRUPED robot, configure the four knee joints (FL_KNEE, FR_KNEE, RL_KNEE, and RR_KNEE) with a springConstant of 40.0 and a dampingConstant of 2.0. Ensure the hip joints (FL_HIP, FR_HIP, RL_HIP, RR_HIP) remain unmodified. Save the final world configuration to /home/ga/Desktop/quadruped_impedance.wbt.
